7 // -*- C++ -*-
8 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_EVALFUNCTIONTRAITS_H
9 #define ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_EVALFUNCTIONTRAITS_H
10 /* Author : desrozis at Wed Nov 7 15:33:28 2012
11  * Generated by createNew
12  */
13 
14 /*
15  * \ingroup Law
16  * \brief Outil interne pour l'invocation de la signature d'une fonction
17  *
18  */
19 
20 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/ArcGeoSim.h"
21 
22 #include <boost/fusion/include/size.hpp>
23 #include <boost/fusion/include/vector.hpp>
24 #include <boost/fusion/include/at_c.hpp>
25 #include <boost/preprocessor/iteration/local.hpp>
26 #include <boost/preprocessor/repetition/enum.hpp>
27 
28 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
29 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
30 
31 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
32 
33 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
34 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
35 
36 namespace details {
37 
38 template<typename T,typename V, Integer>
39 struct EvalFunc;
40 
41 #define EVAL_MAX_SIZE 20
42 
43 #define SIG(z,n,x) typename boost::fusion::result_of::at_c< x, n>::type
44 
45 #define EVALFUNCSIG(z,n,V) \
46  template<typename T, typename V> \
47  struct EvalFunc<T,V,n> \
48  { \
49  typedef void (T::*func_type)( BOOST_PP_ENUM(n,SIG,V) ) const; \
50  };
51 BOOST_PP_REPEAT(EVAL_MAX_SIZE, EVALFUNCSIG,V)
52 
53 #undef EVALFUNCSIG
54 #undef SIG
55 
56 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
57 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
58 
59  template <class T, typename EvalFunc<T const,typename T::Signature::FuncSigTypes,T::Signature::nb_eval_arguments>::func_type const>
60  struct member_eval_bind
61  {
62  typedef T type;
63  };
64 
65  template <class T1, class T2>
66  struct has_eval
67  {
68  static const bool value = false;
69  };
70 
71  template <class T>
72  struct has_eval<T, typename member_eval_bind<T, &T::eval>::type>
73  {
74  static const bool value = true;
75  };
76 
77  template <class T>
78  struct is_valid_eval
79  {
80  static const bool value = has_eval<T, T>::value;
81  };
82 
83  template <class T, typename EvalFunc<T const,typename T::Signature::DerivFuncSigTypes,T::Signature::nb_diff_eval_arguments>::func_type const>
84  struct member_diff_eval_bind
85  {
86  typedef T type;
87  };
88 
89  template <class T1, class T2>
90  struct has_diff_eval
91  {
92  static const bool value = false;
93  };
94 
95  template <class T>
96  struct has_diff_eval<T, typename member_diff_eval_bind<T, &T::eval>::type>
97  {
98  static const bool value = true;
99  };
100 
101  template <class T>
102  struct is_valid_diff_eval
103  {
104  static const bool value = has_diff_eval<T, T>::value;
105  };
106 
107 }
108 
109 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
110 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
111 
112 template<typename T>
113 struct EvalFunctionTraits
114 {
115  static const bool is_valid = details::is_valid_eval <T>::value;
116  static const bool is_differentiable = details::is_valid_diff_eval<T>::value;
117 };
118 
119 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
120 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
121 
122 END_LAW_NAMESPACE;
123 
124 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
125 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
126 
127 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_EVALFUNCTIONTRAITS_H */
